title: Stone Chest
body:
Have you ever been in the solution of needing a chest but you dont have any wood on you?
This mod provides chests made of Andesite, Polished Andesite, Chiseled Deepslate, Cobbled Deepslate, Cracked Deepslate Bricks, Cracked Deepslate Tiles, Deepslate, Deepslate Bricks, Deepslate Tiles, Polished Deepslate, Cobblestone, Mossy Cobblestone, Stone, Smooth Stone, Chiseled Stone Bricks, Cracked Stone Bricks, Mossy Stone Bricks, Stone Bricks, Calcite, Diorite, Polished Diorite, Dripstone, Granite, Polished Granite, Prismarine, Prismarine Bricks, Dark Prismarine, Tuff, Tuff Bricks, Polished Tuff, Chiseled Tuff, Chiseled Tuff Bricks, Basalt, Smooth Basalt, Polished Basalt, Blackstone, Polished Blackstone, Polished Blackstone Bricks, Cracked Polished Blackstone Bricks and Chiseled Polished Blackstone.

Any bugs/ideas/requests
  -  Post it on Issues page!

About ModPacks 
  -  Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks.
